mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, total_amount, item_count, status, urgent_count, last_urgent_time, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(id, user_id, username, total_amount, item_count, status, urgent_count, last_urgent_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{totalAmount}, #{itemCount}, #{status}, #{urgentCount}, #{lastUrgentTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET urgent_count = urgent_count + 1, last_urgent_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, product_name, price, discount, quantity, unit, subtotal FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item(order_id, product_id, product_name, price, discount, quantity, unit, subtotal) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{discount}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{subtotal})

INSERT INTO order_item(order_id, product_id, product_name, price, discount, quantity, unit, subtotal) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.price}, #{item.discount}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.subtotal})
